text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Tamamo Cross will be hosting a modest
takoyaki party for three.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All right, listen up! It's all in the wrist! Ya gotta
get the snappin' rhythm down!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You stick the pick in like this and... turn! Turn! Let
'em settle a sec, then pop 'em out!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Last, just drizzle the secret sauce over 'em 'n
boom! You've got a batch of my extra soft
takoyaki!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh, wow! You're a genius, Tama.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That I am! If it's takoyaki you're after, I'm number
one!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thank you... I want you to make this takoyaki for
me every morning!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, that's quite a tall order you're makin'
there!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Geez, it's takoyaki—not your momma's miso soup.
choice_data_list: That just goes to show how impressed she is.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Still, I'm happy that you're happy! And you,
Trainer! Ya haven't even had one yet!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, eat up! They're pipin' hot in the middle, so
watch ya don't go burnin' yer tongue!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Man, I just told ya to watch out! Here, have some
ice-cold water.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Mmph?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Man, not you too!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh I'm fine, I was just surprised... It's just so fluffy
and gooey.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The juices have such a wonderful aroma... So this
is how authentic takoyaki tastes...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, flavor like this isn't easy to come by, huh?
Now try one with some cod roe mayo!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I will! I could eat a hundred of these!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Done, and done! ...You really are a bottomless
pit, ya know that?
choice_data_list: They're so delicious I just can't stop!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch... I think I have enough space for a thousand more!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
My arm's gonna fall off! But hey, glad to hear ya
like 'em so much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross is busily cooking away, but I
haven't seen her eat a single takoyaki herself
yet...
choice_data_list: Why don't you have some too?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Nah, don't worry 'bout me! I'm havin' fun
just makin' 'em!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Good food tastes best when it's shared with
everyone. I'll just give you a couple of mine...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Here you... go... Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm good, honest! 'Sides, it's hard to take up your
offer when you look so torn up about sharin' 'em!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I can't let you go hungry... Take the plate—oh no!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The takoyaki start rolling off the plate!
choice_data_list: We can't let them go to waste!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The takoyaki start rolling off the plate!
choice_data_list: We can't let them go to waste!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Just what I was thinkin'! Hup!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch... Heh! Snagged it! Mmm yep, there's no beatin' my takoyaki!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
A little takoyaki goes a long way! I'm not lettin' a
single morsel of food go to waste!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Agreed. Tama might have beaten me this time,
but the next ball is mine!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, is that so? Looks like we got a race on the
table here. But I'm warnin' ya, if we're doin' this,
I'm winnin'!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Wait, why don't we just eat 'em normally?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross's baffled cry echoes around the
room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hit the deck, catching the takoyaki in my mouth
before it hits the ground!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whoa! That's the spirit, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Catchin' it midair was a gutsy move!
choice_data_list:
You put in so much effort making these. I
couldn't let any go to waste.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Man, ya sure know how to butter me up... but it's
hard to take ya serious when there's sauce all
over your mug.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
No, not there! Man, look at you, smearing food
all over your face like a toddler.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'll just wipe it off for ya... Okay, nice 'n clean!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, w-wait no, sorry! I'm so used to my siblings 'n
all...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You're pretty maternal, huh, Tama...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Geez. Whaddya expect when I gotta babysit you
two all the—wait, who're you callin' Mom?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross's exasperated cry echoes around
the room.
